chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3624 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability. 04.02.2025 Mr. Khalid Jawed Khan, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Taseer Khan, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. This matter assails the show cause notice. Learned counsel for the respondent department says that the department shall proceed with the notice and adjudicate the same vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is further stated that pending aforesaid, no coercive action would be taken against the petitioner. In view hereof, petition is disposed of as aforesaid. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
